method: Vertical grouped bar charts showing average yield per district, grouped by season. X-axis: District, Y-axis: Average Yield, Color: Season (Kharif/Rabi). Enables direct seasonal productivity comparison within regions. Proper axis truncation (Yield 20-60 quintals) maintains readability.
objective: Identify districts with significant seasonal yield variations and optimal growing seasons

method: Hexbin-enhanced scatter plot with Area on X and Yield on Y. Color shows data point density. District selector filter allows isolation of regional patterns. Axis binning maintains clarity despite wide area range (5k-20k hectares).
objective: Detect operational patterns and outliers in land-use efficiency

method: Interactive heatmap with District rows and Crop columns. Color encodes average yield. Season toggle switches between Kharif/Rabi views. Tooltip shows exact values.
objective: Recommend optimal crop-season combinations for each district based on historical performance
